prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约17050→16720→12250→15214→17024名，整体呈"降-升-降-升"的宽幅波动格局；2023年曾大幅前移至12250名，2024年回落至15214名，2025年进一步后移至17024名，近两年累计后移约4774名，2025年基准位次约17024名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为78、78、79、79、79人，基本稳定；2026年计划增至82人，较2025年扩招3人（+3.8%），小幅扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次倾向后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第80名（2025年第79名），排名稳定在全国前80，工科实力突出，对中等偏上分数段考生有较强吸引力；2025年声誉评价偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考）；2026年声誉仍偏负面（涉及学术不端事件）；抖音综合热度排名第77、评价"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显热度推高信号；历史投档异常记录显示2025年热门专业投档线暴跌，可能对当年报考心理产生滞后影响；合肥工业大学管理科学与工程为A级学科；机械工程、材料科学与工程等工科实力较强，与宣城校区开设的机械工程、材料成型及控制工程、电气工程与智能控制等专业高度关联，对工科考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，该校开设的软件工程、电气工程与智能控制、智能科学与技术等专业契合热门方向；福建省2026年普通高考总人数约267900人，按近年比例估算物理类约203604人，较2025年增加约11508人，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧；省控线（物理类本科批）2021–2025年分别为423、428、431、449、441分，近年略有波动，未出现剧烈变化；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省宣城市，属长三角腹地，对福建省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在福建省物理类招生计划约占其总计划的较小比例，地域偏好非决定性因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17024名、2026年扩招3.8%使位次后移约388名、福建省物理类考生增加约1.15万人加剧竞争、学校声誉偏负面但工科热门专业持续吸引报考等多因素；预测2026年物理类最低位次约17462名，区间16962–17962名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程与智能控制
- 软件工程
- 智能科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械工程

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 能源化学工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间16962–17962名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如16962名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程与智能控制、软件工程等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如17962名附近）应以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17050 → 16720 → 12250 → 15214 → 17024, showing a wide fluctuation pattern of 'down-up-down-up'; in 2023, it significantly moved forward to 12250, in 2024 it fell back to 15214, and in 2025 it further moved back to 17024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4774 positions over the past two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 17024; the enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 78, 78, 79, 79, 79 respectively, basically stable; the plan for 2026 increases to 82, an expansion of 3 students (+3.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to push rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (79th in 2025), stable within the top 80 nationally, with outstanding engineering strength, attracting upper-middle score segment candidates; in 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (hot majors' admission scores plummeted, some majors had no applicants); in 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative (involving academic misconduct incidents); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 77th with an evaluation of 'average', medium short video exposure, no clear signal of popularity surge; historical admission anomaly records show that in 2025, hot majors' admission scores plummeted, which may have a lagging effect on the psychology of applicants that year; Hefei University of Technology's Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline; Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and other engineering fields are strong, highly correlated with majors offered at the Xuancheng Campus such as Mechanical Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, providing stable attraction for engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., have been continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026; the university offers Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Intelligent Science and Technology, etc., aligning with popular directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Fujian Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 267,900, with an estimated 203,604 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 11,508 compared to 2025, intensifying overall competition; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) from 2021 to 2025 was 423, 428, 431, 449, 441 points, with slight fluctuations in recent years, no drastic changes; Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, in the hinterland of the Yangtze River Delta, with some cross-provincial appeal to Fujian candidates; the enrollment plan for this university in Fujian Province Physics Category accounts for a relatively small proportion of its total plan, so regional preference is not a decisive factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17024, the 3.8% enrollment expansion in 2026 causing a backward shift of about 388 positions, the increase of approximately 11,500 Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province intensifying competition, the somewhat negative university reputation but sustained attraction of popular engineering majors, and other factors; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 Physics Category is approximately 17462, with a range of 16962–17962.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control
- Software Engineering
- Intelligent Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering
- New Energy Materials and Devices
- Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Forming and Control Engineering
- Logistics Management (Digital Logistics)
- Energy Chemical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16962–17962, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 16962), focus on reaching for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Software Engineering; if the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 17962), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次依次约2777→2693→2839→3445→3597名，整体呈"稳中有降"趋势；2021–2023年基本稳定在2700–2800名区间，2024年明显后移至3445名，2025年进一步后移至3597名，近两年累计后移约758名，2025年基准位次约3597名；该校在福建省历史类招生计划2021–2023年均为6人，2024年增至10人，2025年增至12人；2026年计划降至9人，较2025年缩招3人（-25%），明显缩招使竞争减弱，位次倾向大幅前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年第80名，虽以工科见长，但211层次对历史类考生仍具品牌吸引力；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌），2026年仍偏负面（学术不端事件）；抖音热度排名第77、评价"一般"，历史类招生专业少、曝光有限，声誉影响相对较小；合肥工业大学管理科学与工程为A级学科，与历史类招生专业（英语、网络与新媒体）无直接学科映射；历史类招生专业均为文科类，学校工科优势对历史类考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 网络与新媒体属新闻传播大类，2023–2024年持续"明显劝退"（就业压力大、张雪峰效应）；英语/外语类2024年评估为"一般观望"，热度中性偏低；福建省2026年按比例估算历史类考生约64296人，较2025年增加约4044人，考生规模扩大使竞争略有加剧；省控线（历史类本科批）2021–2025年分别为467、468、453、431、450分，近年波动不大；宣城校区位于安徽，对福建历史类考生跨省吸引力一般；历史类仅招2个专业且计划数少，地域偏好非关键因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3597名、2026年缩招25%使位次前移约540名、福建省历史类考生增加约4044人使竞争略加剧、新闻传播类专业持续劝退等多因素；预测2026年历史类最低位次约3027名，区间2527–3527名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 网络与新媒体。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 英语（语种。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅招2个专业，位次在预测区间2527–3527名内，建议以网络与新媒体为一档冲刺、英语为三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如2527名以内）可重点考虑网络与新媒体；位次接近区间上限（如3527名附近）应以英语为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2777 → 2693 → 2839 → 3445 → 3597, showing a trend of 'stable with a slight decline'; from 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable in the 2700–2800 range, with a clear shift to 3445 in 2024, and further to 3597 in 2025, with a cumulative shift of about 758 positions over the past two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3597; the enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 6 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 10 in 2024, and to 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is reduced to 9, a decrease of 3 (-25%) compared to 2025, which significantly reduces competition and tends to shift rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking; although strong in engineering, the 211 level still has brand appeal for History Category candidates; reputation was somewhat negative in 2025 (sharp drop in popular major admission scores), and still negative in 2026 (academic misconduct incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 77th, rated 'average', with few History Category majors and limited exposure, so reputation impact is relatively small; Hefei University of Technology's Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, but it has no direct mapping to History Category majors (English, Network and New Media); History Category majors are all liberal arts, and the university's engineering strengths have limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Network and New Media belongs to the Journalism and Communication category, which has been 'clearly discouraged' from 2023 to 2024 (employment pressure, Zhang Xuefeng effect); English/Foreign Languages were assessed as 'generally wait-and-see' in 2024, with neutral to low popularity; in 2026, Fujian Province is estimated to have about 64,296 History Category candidates, an increase of about 4,044 compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) from 2021 to 2025 was 467, 468, 453, 431, 450 points respectively, with little fluctuation in recent years; Xuancheng Campus is located in Anhui, with average cross-province appeal for Fujian History Category candidates; only 2 majors are offered in History Category with small enrollment numbers, so regional preference is not a key factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3597, a 25% enrollment reduction in 2026 shifting rankings forward by about 540 positions, an increase of about 4,044 History Category candidates in Fujian Province slightly intensifying competition, and the continued discouragement of Journalism and Communication majors; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 3027, with a range of 2527–3527.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Network and New Media.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only offers 2 majors; with rankings within the predicted range of 2527–3527, it is recommended to aim for Network and New Media as Tier 1 and use English as Tier 3 for safety; if rankings are significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2527), focus on Network and New Media; if rankings are near the upper limit (e.g., around 3527), prioritize English.
